## Purpose

Describe the production contract changed by this pull request.

## Evidence

- [ ] The diff is scoped to one responsibility.
- [ ] Focused tests exercise the public API, CLI, adapter, or file boundary changed.
- [ ] Ruff, strict MyPy, Bandit, metadata, licence, and relevant build checks pass.
- [ ] No credential, internal coordination record, or generated noise is included.
- [ ] Documentation and release metadata are updated when the public contract changes.

## Risk and rollback

State the failure modes, compatibility impact, and exact rollback path.
